description_long: This is a fantasy-themed armored warrior doll standing on a circular stone-like base. The figure is clad in ornate, reddish-brown plate armor with gold and orange accents, featuring large, spiked pauldrons and intricate engravings throughout. The doll wields an oversized, jagged sword with a skull motif and metallic details, held in its right hand. A long, decorated cape with flame-like patterns drapes down the back, adding to the imposing appearance. The helmet is angular and covers most of the face, with glowing eyes visible beneath. The base is decorated with a blue circular emblem, enhancing the display quality of the figure.
description: A heavily armored fantasy warrior doll with a large sword, ornate red and gold armor, and a decorated cape, standing on a stone-like base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full armored figure, sword held at the side, and detailed chest and helmet features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the jagged sword's length and design, as well as the layered armor and arm details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, decorated cape and the back of the helmet and armor, with the base visible.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the sword's skull motif, the arm's grip, and the side profile of the armor and cape.
attribute_clothing_style: Fantasy medieval full plate armor with ornate gold and orange engravings, spiked pauldrons, and a long, flame-patterned cape. The armor is reminiscent of high-fantasy video game or comic book designs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with legs slightly apart, right arm bent holding a large sword downward, left arm relaxed at the side, head facing forward, and torso straight. The cape hangs down the back.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral, with most facial features obscured by the helmet; glowing eyes visible, no discernible mouth or eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; head is fully covered by a helmet.
